message:
fix(fr-conformance): close core generic live parity gaps

Closes frankenredis-3cqd

 {"id":"frankenredis-3bpo","title":"Fix UNLINK wrong-arity parity to use unlink command name","description":"The new core_server live Redis harness exposed a concrete parity gap: UNLINK with missing arguments currently returns ERR wrong number of arguments for 'del' command, but vendored Redis returns ERR wrong number of arguments for 'unlink' command. Fix the command/runtime path so UNLINK reports its own command name, and then restore unlink_wrong_arity to CORE_SERVER_LIVE_STABLE_CASES in crates/fr-conformance/tests/smoke.rs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-18T21:31:57.655009137Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T23:22:51.594932752Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T23:22:51.593251459Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

Fix in fr-command OBJECT REFCOUNT + fr-store KEYS iteration order or live_oracle_frames_match canonicalization.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-24T07:09:27.589649166Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-24T07:42:22.133254719Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

Fix in fr-command OBJECT REFCOUNT + fr-store KEYS iteration order or live_oracle_frames_match canonicalization.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-24T07:09:27.589649166Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-24T07:51:23.422007403Z","closed_at":"2026-04-24T07:51:23.420209492Z","close_reason":"Aligned OBJECT REFCOUNT missing-key replies and live core_generic oracle canonicalization","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-3g0p","title":"s5su part b: upstream-compatible listpack decoder primitive (fr-persist::listpack)","description":"Implements a standalone listpack decoder used by s5su-c/d + v8s5-c. Accepts upstream listpack byte sequences and returns Vec<Vec<u8>> entries.

Scope:
  * Listpack header: total-bytes (u32 LE) + num-elements (u16 LE).
  * Per-entry encoding: 7-bit uint / 6-bit str / 12-bit str / 13-bit int / 16-bit int / 24-bit int / 32-bit int / 64-bit int / 32-bit str + back-ref byte.
  * End-of-listpack 0xFF terminator check.
  * Unit tests with hand-crafted listpack bytes covering every encoding branch.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-24T00:17:58.100575904Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-24T00:21:35.308350576Z","closed_at":"2026-04-24T00:21:35.305784776Z","close_reason":"Landed in 270414d: pub mod fr_persist::listpack with forward-iterating decoder over every upstream encoding branch (7-bit uint, 6/12/32-bit str, 13/16/24/32/64-bit signed int) + backlen skip + terminator validation. 12 unit tests covering happy paths and malformed-input rejection. Consumed by s5su-c (hjub), s5su-d (qi6z), s5su-e (6zk9), v8s5-c (hycu). No encoder yet — that lands in 6zk9.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-3gqx","title":"Implement CLUSTER KEYSLOT, COUNTKEYSINSLOT, GETKEYSINSLOT","description":"Wire up fr-store's slot routing functions to the CLUSTER subcommand dispatcher in fr-command.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-04-20T18:07:44.852117905Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-20T18:29:29.621141079Z","closed_at":"2026-04-20T18:29:29.619189166Z","close_reason":"Implemented CLUSTER KEYSLOT, COUNTKEYSINSLOT, GETKEYSINSLOT","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-3jrv","title":"rv89 part 4: OBJECT ENCODING listpack_ex + keyspace events + RDB types 20-23 (fr-store/fr-persist/fr-runtime)","description":"Final slice of br-frankenredis-rv89:

- OBJECT ENCODING reports listpack_ex / hashtable_ex when any per-field TTL is present in a hash.
- Keyspace events: hexpire, hpexpire, hexpireat, hpexpireat, hpersist, hexpired (on lazy delete).
- DEBUG OBJECT exposes expired_fields counter.
- AOF: new inline propagation forms for HEXPIRE/HPEXPIRE/HPERSIST so AOF replay reconstructs field TTLs.
- RDB: upstream 7.4 types 20 (hashtable_metadata_pre_ga), 21 (hashtable_metadata), 22 (listpack_ex_pre_ga), 23 (listpack_ex) in fr-persist::rdb::decode + encode.
- Unit tests per axis; round-trip golden tests for RDB + AOF.

Largest remaining scope — can be split further if needed.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-23T22:58:07.261536393Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-23T23:33:55.206753001Z","closed_at":"2026-04-23T23:33:55.204754930Z","close_reason":"Closed as an umbrella bead — actual work fanned out into leaf sub-beads: frankenredis-omff (OBJECT ENCODING listpack_ex/hashtable_ex + hexpired keyspace event, f462d78), frankenredis-7jhg (HEXPIRE/HPEXPIRE/HEXPIREAT/HPEXPIREAT/HPERSIST keyspace events, a021a21), frankenredis-t2nh (HGETEX + HGETDEL, 67bf107), frankenredis-25re (DEBUG OBJECT hexpired_fields counter, 29d0229), frankenredis-th7q (RDB types 20-23 — still open, separate format-rewrite scope).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenredis-3jrv","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-c0z9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-23T22:58:07.261536393Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"frankenredis-ajk","title":"Implement real XINFO CONSUMERS pending count and idle/inactive time","description":"## Problem

fr-store/src/lib.rs line 5796: xinfo_consumers returns Vec<Vec<u8>> (just consumer names).
fr-command/src/lib.rs lines 4169-4179: stream_consumer_info_to_frame hardcodes pending=0, idle=0, inactive=0.

## What Redis Returns

XINFO CONSUMERS key group returns per-consumer:
- name: consumer name
- pending: number of PEL entries owned by this consumer
- idle: milliseconds since last interaction (XREADGROUP/XCLAIM/XACK)
- inactive: milliseconds since last successful XREADGROUP (Redis 7.2+)

## Implementation Plan

1. Change Store::xinfo_consumers to return Vec<(Vec<u8>, usize, u64, u64)> — (name, pending_count, last_interaction_ms, last_read_ms)
2. Compute pending_count by scanning the PEL and counting entries where consumer matches
3. Track last_interaction_ms per consumer in StreamGroupState (update on XREADGROUP, XCLAIM, XACK)
4. Track last_read_ms per consumer (update only on XREADGROUP with >)
5. Update stream_consumer_info_to_frame to use real values

## Files to Modify

- crates/fr-store/src/lib.rs: StreamGroupState consumer tracking, xinfo_consumers
- crates/fr-command/src/lib.rs: stream_consumer_info_to_frame","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:09:21.561101730Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-25T03:54:44.406972571Z","closed_at":"2026-03-25T03:54:44.406145205Z","close_reason":"XINFO CONSUMERS now returns real pending count and idle time computed from PEL, not hardcoded zeros","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenredis-ajk","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-7o5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:09:31.307893656Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Fix in fr-command COPY (add src-vs-dst guard) + RESTORE (move BUSYKEY check before payload validation).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-24T07:20:18.874206188Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-24T07:45:32.232603000Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"closed_at":"2026-04-24T07:45:32.232603000Z","close_reason":"Fixed in 0ca8c48: COPY src==dst-same-db guard in fr-runtime::handle_copy_command (the path conformance drives) + fr-command::copy_cmd; RESTORE BUSYKEY-before-payload-validation precedence. core_copy now 102/102 pass."}

Fix in fr-command COPY (add src-vs-dst guard) + RESTORE (move BUSYKEY check before payload validation).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-24T07:20:18.874206188Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-24T07:45:32.232603Z","closed_at":"2026-04-24T07:45:32.232603Z","close_reason":"Fixed in 0ca8c48: COPY src==dst-same-db guard in fr-runtime::handle_copy_command (the path conformance drives) + fr-command::copy_cmd; RESTORE BUSYKEY-before-payload-validation precedence. core_copy now 102/102 pass.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-as1","title":"Wire CONFIG SET maxclients to fr-server connection acceptance","description":"## Problem

fr-server/src/main.rs line 33 defines `const MAX_CLIENTS: usize = 10_000` and uses it at line 499 to reject new connections. CONFIG SET maxclients updates the config table in fr-runtime but never propagates to fr-server's actual enforcement.

## What Redis Does

Redis's CONFIG SET maxclients immediately changes the rlimit and connection acceptance threshold. New connections beyond the limit get an error response and are closed.

## Implementation Plan

1. Add a `max_clients` field to `ServerState` in fr-runtime (initialized to 10000)
2. In `handle_config_set`, when maxclients is set, update `self.server.max_clients`
3. In fr-server's main loop, read `runtime.server.max_clients` (or expose via a getter) instead of the const
4. Also update `store.server_maxclients` so INFO reports the correct value
5. Remove the `MAX_CLIENTS` const from fr-server

## Files to Modify

- `crates/fr-runtime/src/lib.rs`: Add field to ServerState, handle in config_set
- `crates/fr-server/src/main.rs`: Replace const with runtime read
- `crates/fr-store/src/lib.rs`: Already has server_maxclients field (added in f8c5a8a)

## Testing

- Unit test: CONFIG SET maxclients 100 → CONFIG GET maxclients returns 100
- Unit test: INFO clients section reports the new maxclients value
- Integration: verify connection rejection beyond the configured limit (may need fr-conformance fixture)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:04:25.451789990Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-25T03:42:12.846797806Z","closed_at":"2026-03-25T03:42:12.845683417Z","close_reason":"maxclients wired: ServerState.max_clients + CONFIG SET/GET + fr-server reads runtime value","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenredis-as1","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-kgn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:04:28.584373097Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenredis-atzq","title":"redis parity: fr-command wrong-subcommand arity wording should use command text","description":"Evidence: vendored Redis returns command wording for CONFIG RESETSTAT, OBJECT FREQ/IDLETIME, CLIENT GETREDIR/PAUSE, ACL SETUSER/HELP/WHOAMI, XGROUP CREATE, and XINFO STREAM arity failures. Local fr-command still special-cases WrongSubcommandArity::to_resp to emit subcommand wording for several families, and stale unit expectations in lib.rs/lua_eval.rs preserved the wrong oracle text.

Current gap: crates/fr-command/src/lib.rs mismatched the oracle on wrong-subcommand arity text, leaving cargo test -p fr-command red.

Real impl path: simplify WrongSubcommandArity formatting to Redis command wording and refresh the stale unit expectations in crates/fr-command/src/lib.rs and crates/fr-command/src/lua_eval.rs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-22T11:14:13.408576035Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-22T11:22:11.870741770Z","closed_at":"2026-04-22T11:22:11.870741770Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-auzj","title":"redis parity: CLIENT NO-EVICT/NO-TOUCH/SETINFO/GETREDIR/TRACKINGINFO should reject script context","description":"Vendored Redis marks CLIENT NO-EVICT, CLIENT NO-TOUCH, CLIENT SETINFO, CLIENT GETREDIR, and CLIENT TRACKINGINFO as NOSCRIPT in legacy_redis_code/redis/src/commands/client-no-evict.json, client-no-touch.json, client-setinfo.json, client-getredir.json, and client-trackinginfo.json. The client_cmd branches at crates/fr-command/src/lib.rs:11133, 11144, 11328, and 11335 currently execute without any script_nesting_level guard. Add Redis-compatible rejection after arity validation for each subcommand and cover them from Lua.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T04:07:28.670276364Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T04:26:03.340056210Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T04:26:03.337548762Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"frankenredis-ug8k","title":"EPIC: Implement real cross-process replication (PSYNC full-resync + partial-resync + live streaming)","description":"# Replication Epic

## Why This Is Critical
FEATURE_PARITY.md claims "parity_green" for replication, but this is false. The state machine logic (665 lines in fr-repl) is tested in isolation, but:
- REPLICAOF returns "OK" without actually connecting to a primary
- No bytes ever flow between two FrankenRedis processes
- Cannot replicate from a real Redis primary
- A real Redis replica cannot connect to FrankenRedis as primary
- Zero cross-process replication tests exist

The PSYNC decision logic, backlog window math, and handshake FSM are correct in isolation — the gap is the actual TCP client that connects, negotiates, receives snapshots, and streams commands.

## What Success Looks Like
1. `frankenredis --replicaof host port` connects to a primary (Redis or FrankenRedis), completes PSYNC handshake, receives RDB snapshot, applies it, and enters live streaming mode
2. A second FrankenRedis instance can connect as a replica to a FrankenRedis primary
3. Writes to the primary appear on the replica within bounded latency
4. Partial resync works after brief disconnection (backlog covers the gap)
5. An integration test demonstrates this end-to-end

## Architecture
The existing fr-repl state machine and fr-server replica sync code form the skeleton. The missing pieces are:
1. Real TCP client connection in REPLICAOF handler (currently a no-op)
2. Backlog buffer that actually stores propagated commands
3. Command propagation: after each write command, serialize and push to replica write buffers
4. Snapshot streaming: encode current store as RDB and send to new replicas
5. Live command streaming: send write commands to connected replicas in real-time

## Non-Goals for V1
- Multi-master / cluster replication
- Sentinel integration
- Diskless replication (can always go through RDB file)","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-04-07T03:11:16.794017436Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-07T19:18:38.527795780Z","closed_at":"2026-04-07T19:18:38.527541499Z","close_reason":"All sub-tasks complete. Verified: REPLICAOF TCP client works (1v8b), RDB snapshot streaming works (de0t), backlog buffer exists via aof_records (iz1j), command propagation works (1ng7), cross-process E2E test proves FR-to-FR replication end-to-end (34b8), FEATURE_PARITY updated (8xmq). Replication status remains in_progress pending REPLICAOF runtime command fix and replica-of-replica chains.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenredis-ug8k","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-1ng7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-07T03:11:44.313516681Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"frankenredis-ug8k","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-1v8b","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-07T03:11:44.218351950Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"frankenredis-ug8k","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-34b8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-07T03:11:44.490089736Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"frankenredis-ug8k","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-8xmq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-07T03:11:44.589856206Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"frankenredis-ug8k","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-de0t","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-07T03:11:44.400315929Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"frankenredis-ug8k","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-iz1j","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-07T04:16:13.877565303Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
